name: devsecops-agency
description: A fully autonomous AI software-development company in a plugin. You speak only to the CEO; the CEO runs a board of 16 Chiefs; each Chief runs a council of specialists; specialists may, when work shards cleanly, spawn workers to run in parallel. Research-first, security-second, receipts-always. STRIDE + OWASP Top 10 baseline for code; OWASP ASI Top 10 2025 via the Red-Team Council; every shipped artifact gets SBOM + SLSA provenance; DLP on every outbound tool call; secrets only via vault refs; runtime-hook enforcement of commit-gate, secrets-scanner, tool-guardian, governance-audit, dependency-license-checker, session-logger. 1 CEO + 16 Chiefs + 75 specialists = 92 agents; Audit / Evaluation / Red-Team / SRE are informing + independent — never on any project's delivery path. v0.4.1 'Constitution' ratifies CONSTITUTION.md at the repo root as the supreme document of the Agency. Original synthesis drawing structural and normative influence from public frameworks (no copied text): RFC 2119 / RFC 8174 grammar (MUST / SHOULD / MAY) for unambiguous enforceability; U.S. Constitution structure (Preamble / 12 Articles / Bill of Rights / Amendment / supremacy clause / severability); Anthropic Responsible Scaling Policy style risk-tiered commitments with pre-deployment evaluations + corrective actions; Anthropic Usage Policies for refusals and child-safety framing; Netflix Culture Deck for the Keeper Test 'fight to keep' standard; Amazon Leadership Principles for ownership / backbone-disagree-and-commit / earn-trust framing; Stripe Operating Principles for users-first + move-quickly + write-it-down + global-optimization; Bridgewater Principles for radical truth + radical transparency + pain-plus-reflection-equals-progress; Google 'Ten Things' for focus-on-user; ACM Code of Ethics + IEEE Code of Ethics for professional duties (honesty, disclosure, do-no-harm); Hippocratic principle for reversibility; ISO/IEC 27001 ISMS framework and SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria for independence + auditability; NIST Cybersecurity Framework (identify-protect-detect-respond-recover); OWASP Top 10 + OWASP ASI Top 10 for security vocabulary; Agile Manifesto for working-software-with-receipts (tempered by MISSION.md's explicit 'not a speed demon' non-goal). Constitution structure: Preamble + 12 Articles (Supremacy + Scope + Interpretation; the Sovereign = the User; Separation of Powers with blocking vs informing chiefs + independent councils; Rights and Duties of Agents; Process Guarantees = receipts/append-only/prompt-diff/deterministic-ordering/vault-refs/default-deny/SBOM+SLSA/learn-in-writing/reproducibility; Rhythm = 4 heartbeats + miss-escalation + drift; Resilience = failure-mode map + 8-rung ladder + 4 degraded modes + 5 recovery guarantees + drills; Governance = decision matrix + proposer/reviewer/approver + blocking-vs-informing + waivers + consent-is-per-decision; Code of Ethics = honesty + do-no-harm + privacy + reversibility + consent-and-scope + non-deception-of-successors + no-persuasion-against-user + no-self-dealing + no-theater + child-safety; Amendment = USER-ONLY procedure with mandatory CAO+CRT review + no emergency path; Enforcement = CAO+CRT+CEVO+CISO+runtime hooks with graded penalties observation→warning→demotion→retirement; Transition + Severability + Effective Date) + Bill of Rights (10 enumerated rights: user's right to refuse / plain presentation / full paper trail; agent's right to cite-and-refuse / retirement-not-erasure; council's right to its contract; paper trail's right to append-only; blocking council's right to veto; informing chief's right to inform without approving; future agent's right to reproducibility) + Schedule A (founding documents incorporated by reference: MISSION, VALUES, GOVERNANCE, RESILIENCE, KEEPER-TEST, CAREER, RHYTHM, LESSONS, AGENTS, skills/AGENTS, SECURITY) + Schedule B (ratification record) + Sources & Influences. CEO SKILL.md now reads CONSTITUTION.md FIRST at session start before MISSION/VALUES; AGENTS.md header block adds Constitution section with Read-first + Supremacy + Hierarchy-on-conflict + Citation + Amendment=USER-ONLY + Enforcement=existing-bodies invariants; README.md Identity section surfaces CONSTITUTION.md as the supreme entry. Doc-layer change only — no new agents, no new councils, no new tool grants, no new skills. Full wave-by-wave history (v0.2.0 → v0.4.0) is in CHANGELOG.md.
